author: kkii
subject: add outreach dashboard with templates, sequences, and sent-message tracking
body:
New /outreach route surfaces a follow-up queue (overdue / due today / upcoming),
a sent-message log with reply tracking, and editors for templates and sequence
cadence. Email sending is currently stubbed via "Open in Gmail" (compose URL)
plus "Log as sent" so the dashboard is useful before OAuth-based sending lands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: kkii
subject: add MBDA research and full-text VBOC/SBDC source files
body:
Adds the original full-length research markdown files at the repo
root. Note: vboc-contacts-may2026.md and sbdc-contacts-may2026.md
duplicate the condensed copies already at research/<same-name>.md
(those condensed versions remain in place). mbda-contacts-may2026.md
is new research; the ~35 MBDA Business Center contacts have NOT been
parsed into lib/seed.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: kkii
subject: add SBDC state directors from May 2026 research
body:
Append 63 SBDC state/territory directors (e-117 through e-179)
covering all 10 SBA regions. Includes 4 Texas regional + 5 California
regional leads since neither state has a single statewide SBDC head.
Existing ASBDC HQ entries (e-010 Rowe, e-011 Youngblut, e-012
Thibodeau) untouched.

Notable design: Byron Hicks (ASBDC 2025-2026 Board Chair) added as
parallel SBDC entry e-138, alongside existing APEX entry e-059 — same
person, two filterable program rows for the SBDC+APEX dual program he
runs at NC SBTDC. Tiffany Ford added as her own e-161 SBDC entry
(previously only referenced in e-089 ND APEX notes); she runs the
triple-program at UND (SBDC + APEX + VBOC).

Tiers: 21 Tier 1 (ASBDC Board officers + large-state SBDCs +
co-located APEX cross-sells at UA/UWF/IL DCEO/IEDC/MSU MI/OH Dept of
Dev/Kutztown/GMU/UMD/UH/UTSA/Texas Tech/Maricopa/UNO/UND/Boise State
+ LA Regional). 29 Tier 2 standard states. 13 Tier 3 small
states/territories.

18 co-located APEX+SBDC cross-sell accounts flagged in notes with
matching APEX entry IDs for outreach pairing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: kkii
subject: add VBOC contacts from May 2026 research
body:
Append 20 nationwide VBOC contacts (e-097 through e-116) covering all
10 SBA regions. Update e-014 in place (McNulty Center → Arsenal
Business and Technology Partnership rename, same Amy Amoroso, coverage
expanded to NJ/NY/PR/USVI). Update e-015 in place (added T.C. Bryant
as director, verified email/phone, coverage expanded to KY/NC/SC,
bumped to Tier 1 for Fort Liberty proximity).

Tiers: 10 Tier 1 (co-located APEX+VBOC cross-sells at ODU/UTA/UND/
Big Sky EDA/MS State, plus high-profile leaders like Wendy Baumann,
plus large mil clusters), 9 Tier 2 standard, 1 Tier 3 (Pacific
territories). Cross-sell hooks captured for 5 co-located APEX+VBOC
accounts.

Flagged: possible overlap between e-016 (Horstman/Georgia Southern)
and new e-103 (VECTR Center). Skipped existing e-013 (SC Citadel).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: kkii
subject: add APEX contacts from May 2026 research
body:
Append 68 nationwide APEX Accelerator contacts (e-029 through e-096)
to the seed array, sourced from research/apex-contacts-may2026.md.
Skips 6 existing duplicates (Beasley, Thomas, Dixon, VA/GMU, Berman,
Carrier). Tiers: 10 Tier 1 (NAPEX officers + FL/OH/TX/IN/KY/MI/NYC),
40 Tier 2 (standard states + OH sub-centers + tribal multi-state),
18 Tier 3 (territories + small states). High-priority transition
hooks captured in notes (Idaho host change, Maine new director,
Empire NY promotion, MA recompete, Montana interim, NYC SBS new ED).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
